content.full_text:
May 22, 2006

Samuel P. Crowe
Covington & Crowe, LLP
1131 West Sixth Street, Suite 300
Ontario, CA 91762

Re: Your Request for Advice
Our File No. W-06-084

Dear Mr. Crowe:

This letter is to notify you that we have withdrawn the above captioned request for advice per our telephone conversation on May 22, 2006.

If you have any questions, feel free to call me at (916) 322-5660.

Sincerely,

Luisa Menchaca
General Counsel

By: Trish Mayer
Political Reform Consultant
